_note: PR #34 no_metric_pair window-shape sub-taxonomy. Four anonymized synthetic fixtures exercise the classifier (a) target-price-only window (window contains 목표주가 mention but no metric label rows) → no_metric_pair_target_price_only_window, (b) split-window-too-long (revision marker and metric label rows >10 lines apart inside a >30-line window) → no_metric_pair_split_window_too_long, (c) anchor-outside-pivot (revision marker and year-pivot table separated by >25 lines) → no_metric_pair_anchor_outside_pivot, (d) unhandled-broker-template fallback (window has metric labels close to revision marker but no extractable numeric pair) → no_metric_pair_unhandled_broker_template. Forbidden actions: zero PDFs/extracted texts/output JSON committed; values are illustrative.
